description: Product Description Maxome Men's Snow Boots Waterproof Insulated Winter Boot Outdoor Non Slip Lace-Up Hiking Booties Waterproof：Waterproof TPR shell and high quality suede upper of mens lightweight winter snow boots,keep your feet warm and dry in cold weather. Insulated：Warm fleece lined winter boots to keep your feet warm all day. The fleece is thick and soft. It's very comfortable for feet,You will enjoy skiing with the boots. Lace Up / Hook & Look Design：Classic woven laces closure of the winter hiking boot, It's easy to put on and take off boots when you wear thick socks in winter. Occasion: Mens Insulated Waterproof Winter Snow Boots perfect for Snowy, Rainy, Skiing, Hunting, Hiking or Walking in Winter, Daily Work. Men's Snow Boots Waterproof Winter Boots Outdoor Anti-slip Boots for Hiking Trekking Walking Waterproof Construction: The rubber shell and suede uppers are waterproof, preventing feet from water and snow. The snow boots can be taken as rain boots. Nonslip Sole: The anti-abrasion rubber soles are full of antiskid bumps, which are crucial for outdoors activities in winter. Warm Fleece Lining: Warm fleece is lined to keep your feet warm all day. The fleece is thick and soft. It's very comfortable for feet,You will enjoy skiing with the boots. Quick Lacing Design: The lacing system is designed to facilitate putting on and taking off boots when you wear thick socks in winter.
